body: Your account will be suspended unless you verify your login at http://secure-login-check.com now.
This is a final notice from payroll. Update your employee portal password immediately.
The bank detected unusual activity. Confirm your credentials to avoid closure.
CEO request: send the vendor payment today and keep this confidential.
We need the wire transfer completed in the next 10 minutes for the board meeting.
HR has shared a private bonus form. Sign in with your company account to claim it.
Microsoft security alert. Re-enter your username and password to prevent lockout.
Your mailbox quota is full. Click to re-authenticate and restore access.
The CFO needs gift cards for a client event. Reply only to me and do this now.
Tax refund approved. Submit your banking details to receive the transfer.
Vendor invoice mismatch detected. Open the secure attachment and confirm payment credentials.
A shipment issue requires identity verification before delivery can continue.
Legal team requires immediate acknowledgement of the attached policy update.
Your cloud admin password expired. Use the executive portal link to reset it now.
Security operations detected a sign-in anomaly. Validate your OTP within 5 minutes.
Finance escalation: confidential acquisition payment must be executed today.
Vendor portal sign-in is required to release the approved purchase order.
Board request: expedite this confidential payment before noon and do not discuss it.
Immediate action required: acknowledge this compliance notice in the next 20 minutes.
Your supplier contract needs executive review in the secure portal now.
Last warning: failure to confirm this account today will suspend company access.
